name: Monte Rosa Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Monte Rosa Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing a portfolio of novel and proprietary molecular glue degraders (MGDs) for the treatment of diseases in immunology, inflammation, cardiovascular, oncology, and other areas. The company has not generated any revenue from drug sales and relies on collaborations with pharmaceutical partners. Its lead programs include MRT-6160 (licensed to Novartis), MRT-8102, and MRT-2359.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing a portfolio of novel and proprietary molecular glue degraders, or MGDs.

We combine our artificial intelligence or AI / machine learning or ML engines with multiple proprietary experimental tools to identify therapeutically relevant target proteins amenable to degradation by our MGDs.

catalysts.event: Novartis initiates Phase 2 studies of MRT-6160 in immune-mediated diseases
catalysts.sentence: We expect that our collaborator, Novartis, will initiate multiple Phase 2 studies of MRT-6160 in immune-mediated diseases in 2026.
We plan to initiate a Phase 2 ASCVD study, GFORCE-2, (in elevated CVD risk patients defined by Stage 3/4 chronic kidney disease and elevated CRP) in H2 2026

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 2 study GFORCE-3 in gout flares
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate a Phase 2 study of MRT-8102 in patients with gout flares, GFORCE-3, in Q4 2026 or Q1 2027

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 2 study GFORCE-4 in hidradenitis suppurativa
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate a Phase 2 study in patients with hidradenitis suppurativa, GFORCE-4, in H1 2027.

catalysts.event: Submit IND for cyclin E1-directed MGD
catalysts.sentence: We expect to submit an IND application for a cyclin E1-directed MGD in 2026

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 2 study of MRT-2359 in mCRPC with AR mutations
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate a Phase 2 study of MRT-2359 in combination with a second-generation AR inhibitor in mCRPC patients with AR mutations, with potential to expand the study into additional patient subsets, including patients naive to 2nd generation AR inhibitors. The study is anticipated to start in 2026.

catalysts.event: Results from GFORCE-1 study of MRT-8102
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate results from this study in H2 2026.
